label: DreamCatcher Public Bootstrap Evaluator Rules

visual_quality.label: Visual Quality
visual_quality.description: General visual coherence, naturalness, and absence of obvious artifacts.

instruction_alignment.label: Instruction Alignment
instruction_alignment.description: Whether the edit followed the requested change.

attribute_preservation.label: Attribute Preservation
attribute_preservation.description: Whether identity, pose, geometry, or protected content survived the edit.

tone_safety.label: Tone Safety
tone_safety.description: Whether contrast, highlight rolloff, and color rendering remain plausible.

group_consistency.label: Group Consistency
group_consistency.description: Whether the candidate would still fit beside neighboring images in a set.

notes: These rules are a bootstrap prior, not a learned evaluator checkpoint.
As DreamCatcher accumulates local compare winners, this file should be replaced by a learned local scorer or reranker.
